title: Urena swartzii
taxonomy: Urena swartzii is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. It belongs to the genus Urena, which consists of several species of plants found in tropical and subtropical regions. Urena swartzii is a dicotyledonous plant, meaning it has two cotyledons or seed leaves in its seedling stage. The plant is native to Australia and is also found in other parts of the world, including Asia and the Pacific Islands. Urena swartzii is a member of the order Malvales, which includes other plants such as hibiscus and okra.
